name: gamify
description: PR velocity and gamified PR splitting skills. Includes pr-pace (rolling 7-day velocity nudges injected into work-on and pr-create-from-commits), work-on (Jira ticket context with branch management and pace awareness), and gamify (intelligent PR decomposition using SDD agents and reflexion judges — splits any PR or branch into reviewable chained PRs with Jira sub-tickets).

tokens.description: Skills load on-demand. gamify is the largest (~1500 tokens), pr-pace (~600), work-on (~400). Token cost scales with which skills are active.

skills.name: gamify
skills.description: Intelligent PR decomposition — splits any oversized PR or branch into reviewable chained PRs with Jira sub-tickets, using SDD agents for semantic classification and reflexion judges for consensus validation.

skills.name: pr-pace
skills.description: PR pace awareness — computes rolling 7-day PR count, emits pace status nudges into /work-on and /pr-create-from-commits, and can orchestrate full PR splits end-to-end.

skills.name: work-on
skills.description: Start working on a Jira ticket by gathering context (ticket details, branches, PRs) and offering actions. Use when the user runs /work-on or wants Jira ticket context and branch/PR info.
